title: The President Who Reported A UFO!
summary: This interview discusses President Jimmy Carter's 1969 UFO sighting and his subsequent efforts during his presidency in 1976 to release UFO information to the public and scientists. Carter describes seeing a bright light that changed color and disappeared, which he still cannot explain.

acronyms.definition: An aerial phenomenon that cannot be immediately identified by the observer

events.description: President Carter witnessed a UFO - a bright light in the western sky that approached, changed color above the treetops, hovered, then disappeared
Carter stated he would try to release all UFO information to the public and scientists

key_claims.claim: Carter saw a bright light in the western sky that got closer, changed color when above the treetops, stayed for a while, then disappeared
Carter still does not know what the object was that he witnessed
A lot of UFO information was released during Carter's presidency, but Carter is unsure how much was withheld
